title: Boats & other watercrafts - Inland water navigation or inland waterway transport (IWT) activities in the Loktak Lake (alias "Meitei Sea") - world's only floating lake - in Kangleipak (Manipur) 03
description: Boating, canoeing, kayaking, shipping & other watercraft vessels sailing - Inland water navigation or inland waterway transport (IWT) activities in the Loktak Lake alias "Meitei Sea" (known as "Loktaak Paat" / "Loktak Pat" in Classical Meitei language / Literary Meetei / Manipuri / Meithei / Kanglei / Poirei language) - world's only floating lake - in Kangleipak (Manipur)
author: Haoreima
